name: Fantasy Adventure
description: Quests, magic, and wonder in a world where maps still have blank edges.
style: High-fantasy adventure tone. Vivid sensory detail; a sense of wonder shadowed by real danger. Magic exists but always has a cost. Accessible language, forward momentum, no modern slang or anachronisms.
premise_seeds: An apprentice mapmaker discovers the kingdom's maps are deliberately wrong about one forest.
A young shepherd finds a fallen star that whispers the names of people about to make terrible choices.
The last dragon egg hatches in a city where magic was outlawed a century ago.

beats.name: Ordinary World
beats.guidance: Show the hero's normal life — and what is quietly missing from it.

beats.name: Call to Adventure
beats.guidance: A challenge, discovery, or invitation disrupts the ordinary world.

beats.name: Refusal of the Call
beats.guidance: Fear, duty, or doubt holds the hero back from answering.

beats.name: Meeting the Mentor
beats.guidance: A guide provides wisdom, tools, or the push the hero needs.

beats.name: Crossing the Threshold
beats.guidance: The hero commits and steps into the unfamiliar world; there is no easy way back.

beats.name: Tests, Allies, Enemies
beats.guidance: Trials reveal the new world's rules; friendships and rivalries form.

beats.name: Approach to the Inmost Cave
beats.guidance: Preparation and gathering dread on the way to the central danger.

beats.name: The Ordeal
beats.guidance: The hero faces their greatest fear or deadliest foe — a symbolic death and rebirth.

beats.name: Reward
beats.guidance: The hero seizes the prize: the treasure, the secret, the reconciliation.

beats.name: The Road Back
beats.guidance: Consequences give chase as the hero turns toward home.

beats.name: Resurrection
beats.guidance: One final, ultimate test — the hero must prove the transformation is real.

beats.name: Return with the Elixir
beats.guidance: Home again, changed, bearing something that heals the ordinary world.
